title: 212  How to preach a common man to take up Krishna consiousness
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: All facilities are given to us by God.
God is there in my heart as Chaitya Guru.
He is constantly with me, observing my desires.
If I even once desire, let me go back to God sincerely, Krishna notices it and He makes
all arrangements for my further progress in Krishna Consciousness.
He is there inside the heart as Chaitya Guru.
Then He has made arrangements for us to progress in spiritual life in the form of saintly people
Then He has compiled Vedas due to His great causeless mercy to deliver us.
So that when we associate devotees, when we discuss about the Lord's pastimes, His glories,
Shrinvatam Svakata Krishna, Punya Shravanakirtanah, Hrdi Antastohi Abhadrani Vidhunoti Suhrat Satam.
If you, if the only thing what we should do, the best thing that can be done to save the
sufferings of mankind and all conditioned souls is somehow to systematically broadcast
Give people an opportunity to hear about God.
So when the forgotten souls, because Maya has made them forgot, forget about the real
Maya's Bhavanatmika Shakti and Prakshaatmika Shakti is very strong and they're behaving
Let them hear who are they.
So this is the only way we can uplift.
Allow them to hear about God somehow or other.
You can organize some Kirtan at home, invite your friends, your relatives nicely, politely
Just call them and tell there's some bhajan, kirtan, come, attend, give them prasadam.
Initially even philosophy also they'll not like.
Just even doing kirtan and giving prasadam.
And slowly when they start appreciating, when they develop respect and appreciation, then
So in this way, intelligently, we should help the fallen souls to somehow or other develop
a taste to hear about God.
Once they develop the taste, it's a gradual process.
We'll have to wait years together.
Not even one day, two day, one month, two month.
